content.speakerText: Could I get a free map of the city?
content.speakerTextCn: 能给我一张免费城市地图吗？

options.text: Of course! Here’s one with all the top spots marked.
I don’t have one, ask the police.
You need to pay $5 for it.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了礼貌且符合语境的回应，符合 'Could I get...' 的请求场景。选项1错误地表示要购买地图，与 'free map' 矛盾；选项3和4缺乏礼貌且不符合服务人员的典型回应。

content.speakerText: Thanks so much! You've been super helpful.
content.explanation: 正确答案回应了感谢并表达了美好祝愿，符合服务场景的礼貌结束语。选项1过于冷淡；选项3不礼貌；选项4贬低了自己的帮助，不符合英语文化中积极回应感谢的习惯。

content.speakerText: Do you have a map I could take with me?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有我可以带走的地图吗？

options.text: Yes, here you go. The subway stations are highlighted.
Why do you need a map?
You should download an app instead.

content.explanation: 正确答案礼貌地提供地图并附加有用信息，符合场景需求。选项1直接拒绝，不友好；选项3反问显得不耐烦；选项4虽然合理，但未直接回应索取请求，不符合 'must_speak' 的即时服务要求。

content.template: Could I ___ a free map of the city?
content.hint: 礼貌请求物品时的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Could I get...?（礼貌索取）

content.template: Thanks so much! You've been ___ helpful.
content.hint: 口语中加强语气的常用词，比 'very' 更自然
content.knowledgePoint: 口语高频副词搭配：super helpful

content.hint: 递送物品时的惯用表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Here you go!（递东西时的口语用语）

content.speakerText: Could I get a free map of the city?
content.speakerTextCn: 能给我一张免费城市地图吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! Here’s one with all the top spots marked.
Sure thing! You can grab one from the rack over there.
Absolutely! This one includes the metro stops and tourist attractions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提供地图或指引获取方式
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用了礼貌表达
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常服务回应习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'map', 'free', 'top spots' 或类似关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks so much! You've been super helpful.
expectedAnswers: No problem! Enjoy the sights and have a wonderful day!
You're welcome! Don’t hesitate to ask if you need anything else.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并表达祝福或开放支持
语言准确性：是否避免使用过于生硬或冷漠的回应（如 'Bye.'）
表达自然度：是否使用地道口语表达，如 'Anytime', 'No problem'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'thank you', 'trip', 'enjoy', 'helpful' 等语境关键词

content.speakerText: Could you point me to where I can get a city map?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能告诉我哪里可以拿到城市地图吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! There’s a rack just by the entrance — all maps are free.
Of course! The tourist information desk to your left has plenty.
You can find one at the front desk, or download the official app if you prefer.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰指引地图获取位置或方式
语言准确性：是否使用正确介词、动词搭配（point me to, get a map）
表达自然度：是否使用口语化但礼貌的表达，避免机械式回答
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'map', 'free', 'where', 'get' 等场景关键词
